svg.title: Six-month isometric GitHub contribution timeline for shivanshsenpai
svg.desc: Dynamic six-month isometric timeline generated from public GitHub contribution data.
svg.text: Every tower is a day. Height and number show daily edits across the last six months.
Range: Jan 25 - Jul 24, 2026. Auto-generated from the public GitHub contribution calendar.

g.text: Numbers above active towers are daily edits. Month and week labels make the six-month timeline readable.
